## 🔬 Methodology

- **Test Iterations**: 5 runs per command
- **Simulation Model**: Realistic variance with complexity-based performance degradation
- **Metrics Captured**: Execution time, token usage, success rate, memory usage, cache efficiency
- **Statistical Confidence**: 95% confidence interval
- **Ranking Algorithm**: Weighted composite score (40% success rate, 30% execution time, 20% token efficiency, 10% cache performance)
